data.body: verification-orchestrator.ts:486-492 sets state: 'open' via getBackend().update(), which normalizeStateForWorkflow maps to the workflow initialState (ready_for_planning). Causes invalid backward transitions like ready_for_implementation -> ready_for_planning. Should use knots.nextKnot(beatId) instead.
data.title: Replace kno update --status with kno next in transitionToRetry
